title: Lead Instructional Designer at VIT University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at VIT University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
